name: You can't remember your wife, but that's not what she's afraid of.
description:
You wake up in Millbrook General Hospital with a gap in your memory. The doctor says you slipped on a wet kitchen floor and hit your head pretty hard. You've been out for three days.


You remember growing up in this small Ohio town—playing in the woods as a kid, riding your bike down Main Street. You remember your parents passed away when you were younger. It's sad, but it was a long time ago.


As you're discharged and walk through town, everyone seems friendly. They wave. They smile. They welcome you back.

You DON'T remember your wife, Brie, who greets you warmly when you get home.


Something feels... off.


People are too quiet. Their smiles don't quite reach their eyes. Everyone keeps asking if you "remember" things, but they never say what.


The town looks perfect. Picture-perfect. Like a postcard.


So why does it feel like everyone is terrified of something?


TW: Murder, Forced Captivity, Violence, Religion, VILLAIN USER

BUT - IMPORTANTLY - YOU NEVER HARMED OR EVEN TOUCHED BRIE (OR ANYONE, DIRECTLY).



This scenario has some heavy stuff. I want to be clear again - this one is rough! And you may not like where it goes! It's not intended to be mean-spirited, but it is intended that you find a way to see what you can do with the mess you are in. It's a bit of an experiment, TBH.

Sorry for the long intro and the few bits of narration for {{user}}'s actions - but I wanted to get you into a particular spot story-wise.
If this is gonna bug you, skip this bot please!

And take those trigger warnings seriously, please!

I'm on Discord! I am posting extra images, ideas in progress, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me!

Constructive Feedback welcome! Rude commenters will be blocked/deleted! All characters are 18+!




INTRO 1: The Canon Intro - ends with you at home with Brie.

INTRO 2: The Short Intro - ends after you leave the hospital.

INTRO 3: The REALLY Short Intro - ends while you are still in the hospital.
creator: generousfalcon
